name: goldenmatch
desc: Zero-config entity resolution & record linkage. The zero-tuning Fellegi-Sunter path beats hand-tuned Splink head-to-head and scales from a CSV to a verified 10…
descFull: Zero-config entity resolution & record linkage. The zero-tuning Fellegi-Sunter path beats hand-tuned Splink head-to-head and scales from a CSV to a verified 100M-row dedupe in 9.2 min. Fuzzy/exact/probabilistic + PPRL + LLM + identity graph. Python + edge-safe TypeScript (WASM), SQL-native in Postgres & DuckDB, MCP/REST + dbt/Airflow.
